use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF HIV-1 INFECTION BY THE CO-ADMINISTRATION OF TIPRANAVIR AND RITONAVIR.

indications.text:
APTIVUS, co-administered with ritonavir, is indicated for combination antiretroviral treatment of HIV-1 infected patients who are treatment-experienced and infected
with HIV-1 strains resistant to more than one protease inhibitor (PI).
This indication is based on analyses of plasma HIV-1 RNA levels ...
